LanguageData.MIL_GlobalWindows: Skin large windows with the Morrowind theme
LanguageData.MIL_ShowTradeMessages: Show pawn to pawn trade notices
LanguageData.MIL_UseTraderSpots: Use optional trader spots when available
LanguageData.MIL_SettingsBlurb: This version focuses entirely on the Morrowind style inventory, role based personal stockpiles, inventory first logistics, optional trader spots, and visible pawn to pawn trading notices.
